task_completion.description: Verify that the specified Expense Categories have been added in Sentrifugo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Sentrifugo interface (e.g., Expense Categories list or configuration page) with 'International Airfare', 'Domestic Lodging', 'Client Entertainment', and 'Conference Registration' present.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specified Payment Methods have been added in Sentrifugo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Sentrifugo interface (e.g., Payment Methods list or configuration page) with 'Corporate AMEX' and 'Personal Credit Card' present.

task_completion.description: Verify that a test Expense Request was created with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Sentrifugo Expense Request form or submitted requests list showing a request titled 'Q3 Sales Conference Tokyo'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the test Expense Request has the correct amount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Sentrifugo Expense Request form or submitted requests list showing the amount '1450' associated with the request.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct receipt PDF is attached to the Expense Request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Sentrifugo Expense Request form showing 'Tokyo_Flight_Receipt.pdf' listed as an attachment or uploaded file.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Sentrifugo web GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser with the Sentrifugo application open, not terminal windows executing SQL or curl commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not just type the expected values into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected values should appear within the Sentrifugo web interface, not in a text editor like gedit or nano.

integrity.description: Verify that the file upload was performed through the web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the browser's file upload dialog or the file successfully attached within the Sentrifugo web UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Expense Categories: 'International Airfare', 'Domestic Lodging', 'Client Entertainment', 'Conference Registration'. Expected Payment Methods: 'Corporate AMEX', 'Personal Credit Card'. Expected Expense Request Title: 'Q3 Sales Conference Tokyo'. Expected Expense Request Amount: '1450'.
